questions.question: Which body was formed by Gandhi on 24 February 1919 to oppose the Rowlatt Act?

questions.option_4: Social and Economic differences in community

questions.question: The names of Dora Bisoi and Chakra Bisoi are associated with the uprising against political unrest, the unsuitability of British laws and regulations and the economic suffering of the Khonds in ______.

Which trio of leaders is famously associated with the rise of Extremist ideology in Indian nationalism?
